title: Railway NFR Apprentice Online Form 2026 + Government Job + India + Apply Now
excerpt: Northeast Frontier Railway NFR has released Various Trade Apprentices 2026. Apply online from 20 July 2026 to 19 August 2026. Read the notification for eligibility, post information, and selection procedure.

About Organization

Northeast Frontier Railway NFR is a government organization responsible for the railway sector in India.
The organization aims to provide efficient and effective railway services to the public.

About the Programme

The Railway NFR Apprentice programme is designed to provide training and employment opportunities to young individuals in the railway sector.
The programme aims to develop the skills and knowledge of the apprentices, enabling them to contribute to the growth and development of the railway industry.

NationalityIndian
DegreeClass 10 High School Exam with minimum 50% marks and ITI/NCVT certificate in related trade
